objectives: Use ten Test Report terms accurately.

vocabulary.example: The technician verified report identifier before connecting the sample.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 技術員在連接樣品前確認了報告識別碼。

vocabulary.example: The team evaluated the technical risk related to test item description.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 團隊評估了與受測品描述相關的技術風險。

vocabulary.example: The team reviewed measurement condition before approving the Day 032 test configuration.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 團隊在核准第 032 天的測試配置前審查了量測條件。

vocabulary.example: The reviewer checked test setup photograph against the controlled procedure.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 審查人員依受控程序確認測試配置照片。

vocabulary.example: The test log records the condition associated with result summary.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 測試日誌記錄了與結果摘要相關的條件。

vocabulary.example: We confirmed limit line before releasing the measurement result.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 我們在發布量測結果前確認了限值線。

vocabulary.example: The laboratory evaluates deviation statement under documented environmental conditions.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 實驗室在有紀錄的環境條件下評估偏離聲明。

vocabulary.example: The report links authorized signatory to the applicable requirement and result.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 報告將授權簽署人連結到適用要求與結果。

vocabulary.example: The engineer compared revision history with the approved baseline.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 工程師將修訂紀錄與核准基準進行比較。

vocabulary.example: The final review found that page numbering was consistently documented.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 最終審查確認頁碼編排已有一致的文件紀錄。

common_sentences.english: I will explain how measurement condition affects compliance.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 我會說明量測條件如何影響符合性。

common_sentences.english: Our review found no abnormality in test setup photograph.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 我們的審查未發現測試配置照片有異常。

common_sentences.english: Can you confirm the acceptance criterion for result summary?
common_sentences.zh_tw: 你可以確認結果摘要的接受準則嗎？

common_sentences.english: We isolated limit line as the dominant factor.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 我們已確認限值線是主要影響因素。

common_sentences.english: The customer requested a concise update on deviation statement.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 客戶要求提供偏離聲明的精簡進度說明。

dialogue.context_zh_tw: 測試報告英文測試前審查

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: I have verified report identifier and recorded the setup.
lines.zh_tw: 我已確認報告識別碼並記錄測試設定。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Good. What evidence supports the decision for test item description?
lines.zh_tw: 很好。有哪些證據支持對受測品描述的判定？

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: The calibrated result, uncertainty record, and setup photographs are linked in the test log.
lines.zh_tw: 校正後的結果、不確定度紀錄與測試設定照片都已連結於測試日誌。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Please confirm the acceptance criterion before releasing the report.
lines.zh_tw: 發布報告前，請確認接受準則。

debug_case.title: Ground bond fail — Test Report investigation
debug_case.title_zh_tw: 接地導通測試失敗：測試報告英文調查
debug_case.problem: A pre-compliance check on Day 032 shows a repeatable ground bond fail condition.
debug_case.background: The Test Report configuration was documented before the result was compared with the applicable criterion. This is a realistic training scenario; learners must distinguish observations from hypotheses.
possible_causes: A painted surface increases contact resistance.
The protective bonding conductor is undersized.
check_steps: Use a four-wire check across each bond.
Inspect fastener torque and surface preparation.
corrective_actions: Remove insulating coating at the bond point.
Use a compliant conductor and locking hardware.
debug_case.supervisor_question: How would you prove the root cause before changing the Test Report design?
debug_case.suggested_answer: I would first verify the setup and reproduce the result. Then I would isolate one variable at a time, record objective evidence, and repeat the measurement after the corrective action.

interview_question.question: Describe your RF test experience. Connect your answer to Test Report.
interview_question.hint_zh_tw: 請說明儀器、標準、測試流程與一項可量化成果。 並連結到「測試報告英文」。
interview_question.sample_answer: I plan test configurations, verify instruments, capture traceable results, and investigate abnormal RF behavior. I also explain the technical impact to project teams. In Test Report, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
interview_question.natural_rewrite: A natural engineering answer uses a clear context, your specific action, objective evidence, and the resulting technical or business impact.

quiz.prompt: 「report identifier」的正確繁體中文是什麼？
quiz.explanation: report identifier 指的是「報告識別碼」。

quiz.prompt: 「受測品描述」的正確工程英文是什麼？
quiz.explanation: 工程文件中可使用 test item description。

quiz.prompt: The team reviewed ________ before approving the Day 032 test configuration.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 團隊在核准第 032 天的測試配置前審查了量測條件。
quiz.explanation: 完整句子的關鍵詞是 measurement condition。

quiz.prompt: 播放語音後，選出你聽到的專業詞彙。
quiz.explanation: 播放內容是 test setup photograph（測試配置照片）。

quiz.prompt: Describe your RF test experience. Connect your answer to Test Report.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 請說明儀器、標準、測試流程與一項可量化成果。 並連結到「測試報告英文」。
quiz.answer: I plan test configurations, verify instruments, capture traceable results, and investigate abnormal RF behavior. I also explain the technical impact to project teams. In Test Report, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
quiz.explanation: 回答應包含具體行動、工程證據與結果；系統採關鍵概念給分。
